_instructions.defaultLocales: Locales where EVERY game returned by getAllGames may show. We keep ['ru'] because all our games are localized in Russian, so they always show to RU players. Keep EMPTY only for strict per-game matching.
_instructions.gameLocales: Key = Yandex appID (the number in /games/app/NUMBER), numeric URL suffix, or /games/app/ token. Value = locales that game is ACTUALLY localized in. A game shows to a non-RU player ONLY if the player's language is in this list. If nothing matches the player's language, the whole 'Other games' block is hidden.
